name: /plugin-remove flags every affected rule with provenance_status equal to plugin-removed
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example active-rules && printf 'plugin_id: example
' > .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example/source.yaml && printf 'rule_id: example/foo
provenance: [{class: plugin, plugin_id: example}]
' > active-rules/example-foo.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-remove.sh" example --rules-dir active-rules 2>err.txt && grep -q 'provenance_status: plugin-removed' active-rules/example-foo.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
